rulings.Case Title: ROBERT GALLEGOS VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIAL CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 7, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendants Cahill Contractors, Inc. and Cahill Construction Services, Inc.¿s motion to strike portions of plaintiff¿s complaint is granted with 10 days leave to amend to give plaintiff the opportunity, if he is able to do so, to properly plead a claim for punitive damages. Plaintiff did not oppose defendants¿ motion. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)
